configuration.script: var dict = context.dictionaries(); var props = context.properties(); request.headers().set('X-Dict-Keys', Object.keys(dict).length.toString()); request.headers().set('X-Props-Keys', Object.keys(props).length.toString()); try { dict['injected'] = {'key': 'val'}; request.headers().set('X-Dict-Mutable', 'true'); } catch(e) { request.headers().set('X-Dict-Mutable', 'false'); } try { props['injected'] = 'val'; request.headers().set('X-Props-Mutable', 'true'); } catch(e) { request.headers().set('X-Props-Mutable', 'false'); }
